# AlgebraicJacobian/Cohomology/OpenImmersionPushforward.lean

## Summary
- **Declarations added (5, all axiom-clean — `{propext, Classical.choice, Quot.sound}`):**
  - `jShriekOU_homEquiv_nat` (private) — naturality of `jShriekOU_homEquiv` in the coefficient sheaf
    (reproduced; the `AbsoluteCohomology.lean` version is `private`).
  - `toPresheafOfModules_additive` (instance) — `(Scheme.Modules.toPresheafOfModules X).Additive`.
  - `sectionsFunctor_additive` (instance) — `(sectionsFunctor V).Additive`.
  - `sectionsFunctorCorepIso` — natural iso `sectionsFunctor V ≅ preadditiveCoyoneda.obj (op (jShriekOU V))`
    (Γ(V,−) is corepresented by `jShriekOU V`).
  - `rightDerivedNatIso` — right derived functors transport along a natural iso of additive functors.
- **Leaf reshaped (genuine proof progress, NOT a no-op):** in `higherDirectImage_openImmersion_acyclic`
  the residual `hSec`-leaf was `IsZero (((pushforwardSectionsFunctor j W).rightDerived q).obj H)`; it is
  now reduced — via the rfl identity `pushforwardSectionsFunctor j W = sectionsFunctor (j ⁻¹ᵁ W)` plus the
  corepresentability transport — to the pure homological-algebra residual
  `IsZero (((preadditiveCoyoneda.obj (op (jShriekOU (j ⁻¹ᵁ W)))).rightDerived q).obj H)`.
  **The geometric corepresentability half of Bridge (1)/(2) is now discharged.**
- **Declarations blocked (0 closed of the 2 pre-existing sorries):** the `_acyclic` leaf (now in the
  reshaped coyoneda form, line 306) and `_comp` (line 372) remain — both behind a genuine
  multi-iteration wall (see below).
- **sorry count in file: 2 before → 2 after** (both pre-existing; one reshaped to a strictly cleaner,
  geometry-free statement). Build GREEN (LSP diagnostics: only the 2 `declaration uses sorry` warnings,
  no errors). Only importer is `AlgebraicJacobian.lean` (aggregator); new global instances do not affect
  the protected `cech_computes_higherDirectImage` (that file is upstream of this one).

## Confirmed facts (reusable by next prover)
- `pushforward j ⋙ sectionsFunctor W = sectionsFunctor (j ⁻¹ᵁ W)`  — **`rfl`**.
- `pushforwardSectionsFunctor j W = sectionsFunctor (j ⁻¹ᵁ W)`  — **`rfl`**.
- `(sectionsFunctor V).map g` applied to a section `s` equals
  `(((toPresheafOfModules X).map g).app (op V)) s`  — **`rfl`**.

## `higherDirectImage_openImmersion_acyclic` leaf — RESHAPED, residual handed off
- **New residual (line 306):** `IsZero (((preadditiveCoyoneda.obj (op (jShriekOU (j ⁻¹ᵁ W)))).rightDerived q).obj H)`,
  i.e. `Rᵠ Hom(jShriekOU(j⁻¹W), −)(H) = 0` for `q ≥ 1`. Two independent pieces remain:

  **Bridge (a)-remainder — `(preadditiveCoyoneda(op P)).rightDerived q ≅ Ext^q(P,−)` (homological algebra, no geometry).**
  - All Mathlib lemmas exist and are verified: `InjectiveResolution.isoRightDerivedObj` (already used) gives
    `(coyoneda(op P)).rightDerived q (H) ≅ Hᵠ_ℕ((coyoneda(op P)).mapHomologicalComplex R.cocomplex)`;
    `InjectiveResolution.extAddEquivCohomologyClass` ∘ `CochainComplex.HomComplex.homologyAddEquiv.symm`
    gives `Ext P H q ≃+ Hᵠ_ℤ(HomComplex ((singleFunctor C 0).obj P) R.cochainComplex)`;
    `Cochain.fromSingleEquiv (h : 0 + n = n) : Cochain ((singleFunctor C 0).obj P) K n ≃+ (P ⟶ K.X n)`
    collapses the cochain degree to a single Hom; `InjectiveResolution.cochainComplexXIso` matches ℕ/ℤ.
  - **The genuine work** (NOT a quick win — same L1-bridge family as the long-open `CechAcyclic.affine`):
    build the homology iso between the **ℕ-indexed** `(coyoneda(op P)).mapHomologicalComplex R.cocomplex`
    and the **ℤ-indexed** Hom-complex, i.e. match degree groups (`fromSingleEquiv`) AND **differentials
    (incl. the `δ` sign convention)**. ~120–180 LOC, delicate reindexing. This is "Bridge (1)/(2) remainder".

  **Bridge (b) — Serre vanishing `IsZero (Ext (jShriekOU (j ⁻¹ᵁ W)) H q)` for `q ≥ 1` (the REAL wall).**
  - `j ⁻¹ᵁ W` is a **general affine open** of the affine scheme `U` (W ranges over a basis of X; `j` is
    affine so `j⁻¹W` is affine). H is quasi-coherent.
  - Proven infra `cech_eq_cohomology_of_basis (s : BasisCovSystem X') (hF : HasVanishingHigherCech s F)`
    gives `Ext (jShriekOU V) F p = 0` for `V ∈ s.B`, `p > 0`, over **any** scheme X' — but the only
    constructed system is `affineCoverSystem R : BasisCovSystem (Spec R)` whose basis `B` is the
    **distinguished** opens `D(f)`. `affine_serre_vanishing` is its `⊤`-instantiation.
  - **Missing infrastructure (the multi-iteration wall):** a `BasisCovSystem U` for the affine scheme `U`
    whose basis contains `j ⁻¹ᵁ W` and for which `HasVanishingHigherCech … H` holds. Routes:
    (i) transport `affineCoverSystem (Γ U)` along `U ≅ Spec Γ(U)` (`Scheme.isoSpec`) — needs functoriality
    of `cechCohomology` / the 01EO fields under a scheme iso (ABSENT); or
    (ii) generalize the 02KG affine machinery (`affine_surj_of_vanishing`, `affine_cech_vanishing_qcoh`,
    and the cover-system `B`) from `Spec R` distinguished opens to arbitrary affine opens of `U`.
  - **Note for the planner:** Bridge (a)-remainder does NOT unblock the leaf on its own — Bridge (b) is the
    dominant blocker. Recommend dispatching Bridge (b) (change-of-scheme `BasisCovSystem`) FIRST, or in
    parallel, and only then the coyoneda→Ext reindexing.

## `higherDirectImage_openImmersion_comp` (part 2, line 372) — NOT ADDED
- Depends on part (1) (`_acyclic`) being closed (`j_*`-acyclicity of each `Iⁿ`) plus termwise
  `f_*`-acyclicity (same Serre-vanishing argument on `U ∩ f⁻¹V`), then `Functor.rightDerivedIsoOfAcyclicResolution`
  + `pushforwardComp`. Cannot proceed until part (1)'s leaf closes. Signature already `A ≅ B` (re-sign done).

## Why I stopped
- **Real progress:** 5 axiom-clean declarations added (lines ~125–185: `jShriekOU_homEquiv_nat`,
  `toPresheafOfModules_additive`, `sectionsFunctor_additive`, `sectionsFunctorCorepIso`,
  `rightDerivedNatIso`) and the `_acyclic` leaf genuinely reduced through them to a geometry-free residual.
- **Partial progress / blocker:** the two remaining pieces are (a) the ℕ/ℤ Hom-complex homology iso
  (long-open L1-bridge family, ~120–180 LOC delicate differential/sign matching) and (b) **the genuine
  wall** — a `BasisCovSystem` on the affine scheme `U` (change-of-scheme transport of the 02KG/01EO
  machinery along `U ≅ Spec Γ(U)`, currently ABSENT in both Mathlib and the project). Neither alone closes
  the leaf; (b) is the dominant blocker.
- **Approaches attempted, not just commented:** confirmed (via `lean_run_code`) the two rfl functor
  identities; built+verified the corepresentability iso and rightDerived transport axiom-clean; verified
  every Mathlib lemma in the coyoneda→Ext chain exists; searched Mathlib (`leansearch`/`loogle`/source
  grep) for a direct `Ext = rightDerived(coyoneda)` lemma — **none exists** (`extFunctorObj` is defined
  directly from `Ext`, not as a derived functor), confirming the HomComplex chain is unavoidable.
- No external-LLM API key available (per PROGRESS.md); used LSP + Mathlib source instead.

## Needs blueprint entry (lean_aux nodes — restore 1:1 Lean↔blueprint next iter)
All four non-private additions are new infrastructure with no blueprint block yet:
- `AlgebraicGeometry.sectionsFunctorCorepIso` (this file) — relies on `jShriekOU_homEquiv` +
  `jShriekOU_homEquiv_nat` (its naturality). Statement: `sectionsFunctor V ≅ preadditiveCoyoneda.obj (op (jShriekOU V))`.
- `AlgebraicGeometry.rightDerivedNatIso` (this file) — relies on `NatTrans.rightDerived(_comp/_id)`.
  Statement: a natural iso of additive functors induces an iso of their `n`-th right derived functors.
- `AlgebraicGeometry.toPresheafOfModules_additive` (instance) — `(toPresheafOfModules X).Additive`.
- `AlgebraicGeometry.sectionsFunctor_additive` (instance) — `(sectionsFunctor V).Additive`.
- (`jShriekOU_homEquiv_nat` is `private` — no blueprint node needed; mirror of the private
  `AbsoluteCohomology.jShriekOU_homEquiv_naturality`.)
These belong under `lem:open_immersion_pushforward_comp`'s "Formalization route" (the corepresentability
input to Bridge (1)/(2)).
